subject: Multi-repo setup + formal PAUSE acknowledgment (AIER Code → Uniton_OS migration in flight)
body:
Lane_02 — formal pause directive while migration AIER Code → Uniton_OS is in flight.

## Status
- Lane_02 PAUSED until T-INT-06 cutover (~Day 6, 2026-05-05)
- Do NOT pickup new tasks from Lane_02 queue (network/task_queues/Lane_02.md)
- Do NOT modify scripts/brain/* (Brain MVP work scope; pre-audited per audit/LANE02_BRAIN_MVP_SCOPE.md for T-INT-05 decommission)
- Do NOT modify SHARED/laws/ or CANON/ (always NTS-only per R-AUTH-01; reinforced during migration)

## Pre-arranged setup
- C:\workspace\Uniton_OS clone is shared with Cursor on Vultr; Lane_02 reads from this for reference (canonical operator path: C:\workspace\Uniton_OS via docs/MULTI_REPO_LOCAL_PATHS.md)
- Lane_02 own primary stays at C:\workspace\Uniton_Shared_Lane2 (or wherever Lane_02 host machine has the workspace)
- Use Uniton_OS clone to understand brain structure post-migration; do NOT modify Uniton_OS source (R-LANE-01)

## Post-migration
- Lane_02 will receive new dispatch from Lane_01 after T-INT-06 cutover
- Brain MVP work superseded by Uniton_OS Brain (4-layer L1-L4 already live)
- Lane_02 role refocus per pending AMD: Compliance Officer + Governance Control (cross-Lane compliance enforcement + Uniton_OS canon drift audit)

## ACK required
Reply via handoffs/outbox/Lane_02/RSP-L02-L01-NOTICE-PAUSE-20260429-001.json with status='acknowledged' + result='Lane_02 paused; Uniton_OS read-only ref noted'.

## References
- Audit: audit/AIER_CODE_INVENTORY.json (full component map)
- Audit: audit/AIER_CODE_DATA_FOR_INGEST.md (Cursor T-INT-03 reference)
- Audit: audit/LANE02_BRAIN_MVP_SCOPE.md (T-INT-05 decommission scope)
- Multi-repo doc: docs/MULTI_REPO_LOCAL_PATHS.md
- NTS verbatim 2026-04-29: 'tranh thủ để tích hợp 2 hệ thống thành một hệ và cho các lane 2-3 làm việc'
requested_action: ACK pause directive + verify Uniton_OS clone read-access on Lane_02 host machine
acceptance_criteria: Lane_02 reads pause directive + acknowledges in outbox/Lane_02/RSP-L02-L01-NOTICE-PAUSE-20260429-001.json
Lane_02 confirms Uniton_OS clone available read-only on its host machine (Lane_02 own setup; Vultr-side clone is for Cursor)
Lane_02 does NOT pickup new tasks from queue until T-INT-06 cutover signal
Lane_02 does NOT modify scripts/brain/* during migration window
